list.vod_content: A group of friends hitch a ride to ACL music festival in Texas with a quiet yet magnetic driver. But when people start disappearing, one thingâ€™s certain: not everyone is making it to Austin. Kill Trip is a relentless Texas road-trip horror-thriller that turns a carefree festival journey into a nightmare and something else entirely.
